<!-- Title format: type(scope): description  e.g. feat(web): add annual pricing -->

## What & why
<!-- What does this change and why? -->

## Type
- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] chore / docs / refactor / ci

## Affected
- [ ] `apps/electron`
- [ ] `apps/web`
- [ ] `backend`
- [ ] infra / CI

## Checklist
- [ ] Branched off `dev` (or `main` for a hotfix)
- [ ] CI green (type-check / build)
- [ ] No secrets committed (`.env` stays gitignored)
- [ ] Tested locally

## Notes for reviewer
<!-- Anything to call out: trade-offs, follow-ups, screenshots -->
